Delivery performance rules

Use delivered customer shipments from July 2026 only.

Transit days = delivery_date minus ship_date.
On-time = transit days less than or equal to promised_days for the destination_zone in zone_promises.json.
Region reporting uses the reporting_region in zone_promises.json.
Best carrier uses on-time rate among carriers with at least five valid shipments.
If carriers tie on on-time rate, choose the carrier with the lower total claim_usd.
Round percentages to one decimal place when possible.

Do not use planning, subtotal, return-only, test, cancelled, or non-July rows.
